title: The Reason [Abu Ja'far] Had [the Descendants of Hasan] Transported to Iraq
description: Hasan] Transported to Iraq According to al-Harith b. Muhammad 656-Muhammad b. [187] Sa`d657-Muhammad b. `Umar: When Abu jacfar appointed Riyah b. `Uthman b. Hayyan al-Murri as governor of Medina, he ordered him to search strenuously for Muhammad and Ibrahim, the sons of `Abdallah b. Hasan, not to treat them as of minor importance [as former governors had]. According to Muhammad b. `Umar-`Abd al-Rabman b. Abi alMawali: Riydb vigorously pressed the search for them, showing 653. jac far b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 28
